center.name: 庫拉爾山
center.summary: 庫拉爾山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Kafa white-eye，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in west and southwest Ethiopia as well as on Mount Kulal in north Kenya

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in west and southwest Ethiopia as well as on Mount Kulal in north Kenya
